details.test: Task 1: Start basic US trademark application for Urban Drift
Task 2: Trademark search US + EU under $300 for GreenSpark Solar
Task 3: Select patent filing type for Smart Hydration Bottle under $800
Task 4: Purchase 12-month trademark monitoring plan for two marks under $40/month
Task 5: Renew Swift Brew trademark using most economical eligible option under $600
Task 6: Schedule 30-minute patent strategy video consultation between 10:00-12:00 week of July 13-17, 2026
Task 7: Bundled order for trademark filing with monitoring and provisional patent under $1200 service fees
Task 8: Find wireless charging pad patent filed after 2020 and add to My Patents watchlist
Task 9: Create two trademark drafts and one patent draft, then open drafts dashboard
